title: Fresh Croptopia Seeds
description: Unique, fresh looks for all your favorite Croptopia seeds!
body: Works on any version of Croptopia! Accurate to their real life counterparts! Vanilla style textures! Includes redesigns of all Croptopia seeds and even some vanilla seeds! What more do you need in life? Note: You may be prompted saying the pack is outdated; this is due to the formatting, allowing it to be used on all versions. It should work fine. The pack is pretty self explanatory, so not much to put here. Feel free to leave feedback in the comments! A Few Seed Previews (Find more in the Gallery!): Rutabaga Seeds Peanut Seeds Cantaloupe Seeds And a whole bunch more!
